title: Vanilla+ Gorge
description: Just a modpack that has performance mods and a shaderpack, and QoL mods. This is my personal modpack so keybinds are adapted to my needs.
body:
Ever thought that vanilla MC is slow and bland? Well i got the solution! This modpack has:Performance mods (FerriteCore, Lithium, Sodium)
Iris
Shulker box tooltip mod
And Complementary Shaders reimagined.
Credit is where credit's due, so credits to all the creators of these.
